parameters.content:
## E.0 Master Router
Translated from GHL workflow 407ec6f2-1f90-45d7-b95d-52584b688d9c.
GHL triggers: opportunity_created:Opportunity Created in Buyer Activation Pipeline; form_submission:Home Risk Report Form Submitted; inbound_webhook:Inbound Agentic System Webhook

Entry is a webhook (orchestrator-driven). Credentials by ID only; brand law applied to email senders (Randy Reece). See workflow node notes for [STUB] items.
Flags: 23 | Stubs: 1 | Brand-law: 0
